IEntityCollectionRequestIsSearchAfterLoad Property

One Identity Manager API Server

Note: This API is now obsolete.

Gets or sets flag managing the search strategy.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Handling
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
[ObsoleteAttribute("Use the SearchMode property.")]
bool IsSearchAfterLoad { get; set; }

Property Value

Type: Boolean
Remarks
By default, the search index will be queried first. If this flag is true, the entities will be loaded first, and the search index will be queried using the set of loaded entities.
See Also

Reference

IEntityCollectionRequest Interface
QBM.CompositionApi.Handling Namespace
